assignments.description: Assign to the child accounts the same users previously assigned to the fields SaaS Owner, Education Owner and Billing Upsell Owner.
assignments.name: Assign_Ownerships
assignments.label: Assign Ownerships

decisions.description: Checks if the Billing Upsell Owner field on the account is populated with a valid active user.
decisions.name: Account_Billing_Upsell_Owner_Populated
decisions.label: Account Billing Upsell Owner Populated?

decisions.description: Checks if the SaaS Owner field on the account is populated with a valid active user.
decisions.name: Account_SaaS_Owner_Populated
decisions.label: Account SaaS Owner Populated?

decisions.description: If Micro account (i.e. where capacity is less than 10), do not run Ownership Assignments
decisions.name: Account_Size
decisions.label: Account Size

decisions.description: Assigns an active user as the Biling Upsell Owner of the account.
decisions.name: Assign_Billing_Upsell_Owner_on_Account
decisions.label: Assign Billing Upsell Owner on Account

decisions.description: Assigns an active user as the SaaS Owner of the account.
decisions.name: Assign_SaaS_Owner_on_Account
decisions.label: Assign SaaS Owner on Account

rules.name: Large_Team_Assign_SaaS_Owner_on_Account
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND (3 OR (4 AND 5))) OR (6 OR 7)
rules.label: Large Team

rules.name: SMB_Team_SaaS_Owner_on_Account
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND NOT(4)) OR (5 OR 6)
rules.label: SMB Team

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Account_Has_a_Billing_Upsell_Opp
decisions.label: Account Has a Billing Upsell Opp?

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_SaaS_Onwer_Exist
decisions.label: SaaS Onwer Exist and Is Acount Queue?

decisions.name: saas_owner_exists_on_another_account
decisions.label: saas owner exists on another account

decisions.description: Education Owner assignments should only happen when a new Experience Curriculum is created on the account.
decisions.name: Skip_Education_Owner_Assignment_on_Account
decisions.label: Skip Education Owner Assignment on Account?

Flow.description:
This flow is designed to update the SaaS Owner, Billing Upsell Owner, and Education Owner fields on account records. It's meant to be integrated into other specific flows as needed, to ensure these ownership assignments are made on accounts.
Diagram: https://drive.google.com/file/d/10OJahGybTMm6oY6BMqVnxR_WgQUsbf3h/view?usp=sharing
04/03/24 - PE - Updated groups for Gov/Ent RR 07/17/24 - PE -Updated decision to populate if owner is Account Queue 7/7/25 - JH: Added decision nodes for BUO assignment so that it ends if there is no existing Billing Upsell Opps on Account. Sprint 13 request to remove auto assigment if no upsell opps have been created yet. 7/24/24 - updated to incorporate customer segment into the critieria for each saas owner path 8/27/25 - Updated multi site decision criteria and updated order of saas owner paths to correct routing issues 03/17/26- Updated the micro or large or multisite segment assignment in the flow and also added gov payer assignment to gov RR team 18/3/26 - Updated the condition of Decision element from customer type to related payer customer type 24/3/26 - Implemented Validation for Each SaaS owner Assignment

formulas.description: Formula calculates the current date and time, then subtracts 5 minutes. It serves as the logic criteria to identify if an EC opportunity was created within the last 5 minutes, indicating a new EC opportunity. This ensures compatibility with the date/time format of the Opportunity's CreatedDate field.
formulas.name: forDT_NowMinus5Minutes

Flow.label: Account - Subflow - Ownership Assignments

recordLookups.description: Gets account associates with the record id
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Get child accounts related to this account
recordLookups.name: Get_Child_Accounts
recordLookups.label: Get Child Accounts

recordLookups.description: Looks if an Experience Curriculum opportunity was just created.
recordLookups.name: Get_EC_Opportunities_on_Account
recordLookups.label: Get EC Opportunities on Account

recordLookups.name: Get_other_accounts_with_saas_owner
recordLookups.label: Get other accounts with saas owner
